title: Grid Status Enhancements
changes: Interactive Grid Status List: Miniature map component for every grid anchor location without performance drops.
Address Resolution: Reverse geocoding resolves grid coordinates into full, readable street addresses.
Enlarged Map View: Inspect specific locations in full-screen detail directly from the list view.
Full Location Context: Removed character limits from addresses allowing complete visibility.

title: Timeline, History & One-Click Update
changes: Scan Timeline: View and switch between previous scan runs without losing history.
Run History: Re-runs no longer delete old results — each run gets a unique ID.
Scheduled Scan Info: Header now shows next run date/time and frequency badge.
Cancel Schedule: One-click button to stop a recurring scan from auto-running.
One-Click App Update: Update the app from GitHub directly from the update banner.
Fixed Update Notifier always showing — version is now read dynamically from package.json.
Fixed map auto-panning when clicking a pin — view stays perfectly still.

title: Scanner Accuracy & CID Matching
changes: Fixed critical bug: PlaceId was never saved to the database.
CID-first business matching: match by CID > PlaceID > strict name.
Removed 80% token-overlap name matching that caused false positives.
Numbered rank markers on map (1-20 or X for not found).
Geographically accurate zip code lookups (bounding-box first).

title: Review Intel & Deep Scraping
changes: Source attribution for every AI insight.
Deep scraping for businesses with 1700+ reviews.
CSV export for all review data.
Fixed 'Zero Reviews' bug and duplicate review deduplication.

title: Global Precision Update
changes: Precision Business Identity: Auto-populate and URL-based imports.
Regional Localization: Dynamic locale/timezone adaptation per scan.
Fail-Safe Scans: Automatic proxy blacklisting and direct fallback.
Enhanced AI-Insights: Primary threat identification and market share analysis.
Telemetry Console: Integrated system logs in Settings.

title: Stability Patch
changes: Fixed coordinate validation for equator/prime meridian points.
Improved scraper scrolling performance.
Added system-wide logging utility.
